title: polystichum neolobatum
intro: Polystichum neolobatum, also known as the Chinese fan fern or Lady fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its large, lacy fronds with a distinctive fan-shaped appearance. The medicinal properties of Polystichum neolobatum have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, with reported uses including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valued component in various herbal remedies. Polystichum neolobatum can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or dried powder for use in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and poultices.
